title: Caleb Waddell — Marauders campaign
as_of_session: RP_12 (the rerun) — Welsh moor shooting-lodge, swept & stripped, Fri 23 Sept ~20:02, awaiting Holt's sweep

companion_files.relationships: marauders-relationships.json — the full standing-carrying relationship registry (load alongside this file)

important_note: RP_11 IS NOW EMBEDDED in holystone (project 'marauders', session 'rp11-death-eater-cell-raid', 59 chunks, dated 1977-09-23) as of 2026-06-20. All 11 sessions (rp01-rp11) are indexed; holystone recall now covers the whole campaign.
relationship_rule: Relationships live in marauders-relationships.json; EVERY entry carries an `earned` field (what Caleb has proven/been given/been trusted with). Anti-reset: never default a returning character to first-meeting wariness; standing moves only on-screen, never silently backward.

clock.location: A remote Welsh moor shooting-lodge (bothy; Floo-only, no road) — the night's SECOND Welsh target. Cellar extraction done; the cell's three guards STUNNED (alive, incl. Maddox); the lodge swept & stripped. Gwyneth and her son Tomos are freed and safe. Awaiting Holt's sweep.
clock.phase: Lodge cleared; taking stock; a kill-order clock now hangs over Gwyneth's husband
clock.note: Reconciled to the RERUN ('Magical heist planning'), which supersedes the earlier broken playthrough. Earlier 144G/Maddox-captured/Prosser-Ministry details were from the bad version and have been removed.

player.name: Caleb Waddell
player.background: Half-blood; father Ralph a Muggle clockmaker in Manchester (Waddell Clocks / Cheetham Hill); mother Eleanor
player.role: Wandwright apprentice (to Eldower, Sundays); Hexfield founder; keeper of the Path; deputized to act with the Aurors (Dumbledore's terms)
player.condition: Unharmed; carrying the moral weight of the operation. (Field codename: the four operate as 'BLUE SQUADRON'; Holt's Aurors are 'RED SQUADRON'.)
signature_threads: Draws silver-water up the cherry wand and loads spells with it (massive amplification; turns a Patronus into a 'beacon/summons')
Corporeal Patronus at 18; modular/interchangeable-core wand design (Eldower: 'heresy or the best thing in 30 years - both')
Chasing wandless magic with Henshaw ('not to be remarkable - not to die in a ditch')

Class grid locked: Mon DADA/Alchemy/Herbology; Tue Potions/CoMC/Herbology; Wed Herbology/Potions/CoMC/Alchemy; Thu DADA/Alchemy/CoMC; Fri free/Potions/DADA. Standing: Wed 16:30 Flitwick mind-magic; Thu 18:00 Hexfield drill; Sat 14:00 Hexfield; Sun bench-day at Eldower's (~2 Oct)
player._verify: Whether Caleb Crucio'd/killed in raid 1 (from the original RP_11) is still canon is UNCERTAIN — the reruns trend bloodless (capture, not kill). Confirm before leaning on it.

money.notes: Per the rerun: 102G 16S 20K going in + the three guards' coin (14G + 23G + silver) = 141G 10S 7K.

naming_and_disambiguation._why: These conflate in play and the user does NOT want them merged.
naming_and_disambiguation.Athena: Caleb's LIVING familiar - a European Pygmy Owl, tiny/fierce, slight starboard list. Secondary receiver on the Caleb-Mei bond. Carries Patronus messages (sent one to summon Holt's hound).
naming_and_disambiguation.Caleb_Patronus: A corporeal Pygmy Owl - shares Athena's SHAPE but is NEVER called Athena. Say 'Caleb's Patronus'. First corporeal cast 3 Sept on the bonded-recognition memory.
naming_and_disambiguation.White_Lightning_vs_Goldie_Fawn: White Lightning = the WHITE unicorn mare (splinted, at the lean-to). Goldie Fawn = the GOLD adult unicorn (the centaurs say the gold one was 'sent' to Caleb). Different creatures.
naming_and_disambiguation.Gwenllian_vs_Annwyl: Shrine figure's true name = Gwenllian ferch Rhydderch. 'Merphila' is Caleb's placeholder for the glass panel. 'Annwyl' is deprecated drift - never use it.
naming_and_disambiguation.Holt_vs_Holt_vs_Holroyd: Olive Holt = an AUROR (now a working ally). Davey Holt = a DEAD fresh-marked Death Eater (raid 1). Annie Holroyd = the Muggle florist (romance). Esme Holroyd = a different witch. Keep all distinct.
naming_and_disambiguation.Mei_wands: Mei's own wand is WALNUT (unicorn hair). She also carries the modular wand (gold unicorn-hair core + vervain/mugwort 'Liri Special' module) and her birch SISTER wand.

White Lightning.status: Recovering - splinted foreleg mending clean (broke ~13 Sept). Weeks not months. Do NOT let her run on it early.
White Lightning.earned: Bonded to Caleb specifically - takes silver-water from his hands and 'nowhere else,' came up onto a broken leg when his silver-fed Patronus blazed. Gave the tail-hairs that core the brother/sister wands. 'A unicorn gives its hair only to one it has decided to trust - and you have that twice over' (Dumbledore).

Goldie Fawn.status: Loose in the Forbidden Forest; met once.
Goldie Fawn.earned: Gave Caleb a gold TAIL-hair (singular; now the modular wand's core - sacred, gated). Also gave gold BODY-hairs of different types (NOT singular) - these are Caleb's, out for testing: 7 gold with Sage (to test together) + 5 gold with Pennycuik (his own tests, owes an update). The centaurs say the gold one is 'sent' - and was sent to Caleb. Fawkes sang at the gold hair; Dumbledore wants its origin and told Caleb to keep it very safe.

Athena.status: With Caleb; carrying Patronus-messages on the raid.
Athena.earned: Comes to a silent call down the bond (abnormal - Pennycuik flagged it).

Fawkes.earned: Accepted Caleb; reacted strongly to the gold unicorn hair. Caleb nicknamed him 'Guy Fawkes'. 'He likes you, which is not nothing' (Dumbledore).

the_path.summary: Caleb's PRIVATE interior thread - not a campaign-plot device. Walking it changes Caleb (interior magic + a perceptual channel); runs alongside the war, never feeds it.
the_path.source: Suppressed Borgin & Burkes book: Cuthbertus de Lindesia, 1314 - 'the Path of the Seventeen.'
the_path.the_patient: Aedith Wulfricsdohter (11, 1311) - walked it involuntarily; ended in the FAILURE-mode silentium.
four_petitioners: Margery the Little of Lacock (to conclusion ~1330; book maybe near Cirencester)
Iohannes Capellanus de Sleaforde (absent from the Compendium)
the_path.who_knows: Mrs Brownson + Madam Pince know the word; Cassia declined the hidden quire. Suppressed 1934; original at the Department of Mysteries.
the_path.open_overlap: The Path's three substantives (dew/night/path) are the SAME as the shrine's three taps - connection is a deliberate open question.

merphila_gwenllian_shrine.true_name: Gwenllian ferch Rhydderch - Welsh hedgewitch of Llanuwchllyn; craft = laying snagged souls to rest.
merphila_gwenllian_shrine.merphila: Caleb's placeholder (mer + philos) for the glass panel; he named her. Use 'Gwenllian' for the woman, 'Merphila' for the glass function.
merphila_gwenllian_shrine.hywel_bevan: Her son, master-glazier; built the prefects' bathing-room 1671-72; bound part of her in glass, sealed the rest in a flask under the deep-end tile.

the_two_keys.name: the Welsh name (Liri spoke it)
the_two_keys.pitch: the 13C tone through cold-lake+dew water (Caleb held it)

merphila_gwenllian_shrine.mcgonagall_knows: Soul-flask + Hywel (12 Sept). NOT the private Grand Staircase passage.
merphila_gwenllian_shrine.open: Gwenllian's wishes (rest vs. teaching). Caleb now also wants her help laying the buried forest monster to rest.

silver_water.what: Luminous Forbidden-Forest seep-water (silver flowers mark it). Lit at rest, won't fall, 'a coin's ghost' taste.
silver_water.mechanics: Caleb draws it up the cherry wand into a spell: Incarcerous -> silver flood; Patronus -> a blazing 'beacon/summons'. Consumed when cast.
silver_water.threads: Henshaw wants the closed-door Monday session. Mei: 'a summons - I don't know whose.' White Lightning craves it.
silver_water.stores: Corked demijohns at the lean-to; 2 at Slughorn's office.

office_as_vault.what: A Room-of-Requirement space that works as a hidden, unfindable bank.
office_as_vault.origin: Started (12 Sept) as Cass's flight-fund drawer; Mei named it 'a small, hidden, run-by-children bank' against a possible Gringotts freeze by the old families.
office_as_vault.note: Caleb wants it called 'OUR office,' not the Brighams'; Brigham/Helena portraits retconned OUT (Solomon the gatekeeper portrait stays).

the_buried_monster.what: A 15-20 ft creature the centaurs buried in the forest ~6 years ago - 'bad juju.' Connects to Hagrid's yew burial-grove and the 'partial exhumation via the centaurs' thread.
the_buried_monster.status: Raised to Dumbledore (Fri 23 Sept); he went arrested-still ('we will speak of that, you and I, and not in passing'). Now on the standing Saturday-evening agenda. Caleb proposed Gwenllian could help lay it to rest if it's dark-tied.
the_buried_monster.open: What it is; why the centaurs buried it; what Dumbledore knows.

the_cell_and_the_necklace.structure: The cell answers up to REYNE STOKER (the prisoner Stoker was a coerced go-between to him). A handler called CRANE - the 'C - Sun?' note - visits on SUNDAYS (Maud: 'he came Sundays'). Greywethers (remote, roadless, now cleared) was the cell's intel cache.
the_cell_and_the_necklace.the_necklace: A disc/necklace worn by the Marked that names the wearer back to the sender (an identify/summon device). Imogen drew the symbol. Thread: reverse the call to find the other end. Multiple coerced Floo-office go-betweens feed the cell.
the_cell_and_the_necklace.trap_idea: Caleb is setting Greywethers as bait - the master may come checking when calls go unanswered. Crane Sunday is the live lead.

brother_and_sister_wands.detail: Two birch wands, each cored with one White Lightning tail-hair, open rib-cage. Lock with their twin and refuse to strike. Caleb carries one; Mei the sister. Tip-to-tip + silent joint cast = a single joined dome shield.
brother_and_sister_wands.flag: Cores may still be curing in linseed per RP_09 - verify.

modular_wand_gold_core.detail: Walnut, cored with the GOLD unicorn hair, takes interchangeable modules; runs the vervain/mugwort 'Liri Special' (Protego blooms huge and holds). Mei carries it. Holt tested it and was won over.

interleaved_wand.detail: Birch base, narrow CENTER the modules sleeve onto (NOT ribs), five stepped rings; one white tail-hair. Locked rule: cast full-length, then cut to segments. The 'order of six modules' is the next craft.

aether_slung.detail: Open-rib / exposed-core design; tririb birch practice blanks in the Room.

wand_B_rowan.detail: Hand-cut; unicorn core but the WRONG hair (body, not tail); Reparo/annealed.

inventory_summary._note: Reconciled to the rerun's exact tracker at ~20:02. The .jsx ledger is older.
inventory_summary.wands_carried: Cherry (primary, out). Holstered: brother birch (+ modular birch with the mugwort-and-vervain module fitted — leans a cast gentle), ebony, blackthorn, elm. The lent dragon-heartstring pawnshop wand is back with Caleb.
inventory_summary.captured_wands_tonight: ash/dragon (~9 in), oak/dragon (~11 in), blackthorn/unicorn (~10 in, Maddox's). Plus the ~12 earlier victim-wands to return to families.
inventory_summary.pack: 6 shrunk brooms (4 Caleb's; 2 are Jack Ablewhite's, to return when Caleb visits him tomorrow). 8 shrunk turn-back ward-stones. Whetstone, folding knife, hip flask, wand-oil kit. The papers: a profile sheet ('Prosser, D. — Registry, Floo & Hearth Records, Cardiff sub-office; wife & boy held, surety of compliance') + a guard-signal instruction. Jar of 6 Dark Marks. Billhook.
inventory_summary.site_not_yet_lifted: the alarm-ring stones, the lodge ward-mechanism, ~3 weeks of holding-stores in the cellar.
inventory_summary._full_reference: Complete catalogue across ALL locations (carried, at-site, workshop stock, held-by-others) lives in INVENTORY_REFERENCE.md. This summary stays lean on purpose — do not bloat it.

wiggenweld_bench.method: Most dilute Control that closes a standard cut at 30 min; two-fold serial dilution; daily re-reads.
wiggenweld_bench.owed: Day-7 assay owed to Slughorn; an assay checkpoint may be due ~Mon 26th.

the_dead_and_loot_discipline.earlier_tonight: Pre-dawn: the MARSH family freed (Edwin Marsh, a Ministry Floo Network clerk; mother + 3 children) and STOKER (cell leader) taken alive — a bait-token off him handed to the Aurors to spring later. First Welsh stop = Sallow End: MAUD freed (away to Tenby with Holt); the place left baited = the Crane ambush, Sunday 25 Sept.
the_dead_and_loot_discipline.moor_lodge_now: Three guards STUNNED (alive, for Holt to collect): Maddox (older, grey, fast — set/walked the wards; bore a Dark Mark; had hidden Gwyneth's own wand), the big one (Marked), and the young nervous one (arm bare — never blooded in). Two captives freed: GWYNETH (her own rowan 10 3/4 wand recovered from Maddox's kit) + her young son TOMOS.
the_dead_and_loot_discipline.dark_marks: Jar of 6 excised Dark Marks carried; 2 more harvestable here (Maddox + the big one), unharvested.
the_dead_and_loot_discipline.weight: Heavy but bloodless — all three taken alive (stunned). The young guard was never blooded in. The lodge is swept; Holt's sweep is awaited.

open_threads: URGENT — the kill-order clock: the guards owed a ward-pulse signal at set hours; a MISSED pulse is read as compromise and the standing order is to KILL the clerk. Is the pulse already overdue? Dafydd Prosser may be in immediate danger.

Dafydd Prosser — Cardiff registry clerk (Floo & Hearth Records, Cardiff sub-office), coerced via his held wife & son. Family now free, so the leverage is gone — but the kill-order may fire on the missed signal. The thread runs into the Floo/records side of the Ministry.
Awaiting Holt's sweep of the lodge — hand off the scene + intel; she runs the wider net.
Visit Jack Ablewhite (wand-repair man) tomorrow — return his 2 brooms; bench day.
The Crane ambush at Sallow End — Sunday 25 Sept (Holt's op); Caleb's thread, may want in.
The bait-token live on Stoker — handed to the Aurors to spring at the right time (not Caleb's to spring).
ODDITY — Maddox (a senior Death Eater warder) carried a blackthorn/UNICORN wand; Caleb's wand-reading flagged unicorn-core as unusual for that role. Open question.
The serpent-over-a-broken-ring sigil — still UNIDENTIFIED (do not assume it's 'Crane').
Return the ~12 victim-wands to families; restore Mei's gold wand-core + return her wand; the grave in the Forbidden Forest + the grave talk owed to Dumbledore.

Standing (in the files): the Path; the awake shrine + silver-water; the office-vault; White Lightning; Hexfield; the wand bench; Beauxbatons; correspondence (Annie Holroyd, Cassia Burbage, Mrs Wan, Mam-gu).
